raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=REQ-001 is only supported by invoice approval in SRC-001; SRC-002 shows rail approval scope_code=vendor_profile_review, but SRC-003 requires scope_code=destination_token_release for DT-5106-N, so required authority is missing.
